questions.question: Describe the two main components of a photometric image. (5 marks)
questions.hint: Photometric images are formed by the combination of two main components.

questions.question: What is the primary difference between an additive and subtractive color model? (5 marks)
questions.hint: Explain the difference in terms of how they combine light to produce the final image.

questions.question: Sketch the layout of a simple camera's optical system to illustrate how it forms an image. (10 marks)
questions.hint: Your sketch should include the lens, aperture, sensor, and any other relevant components.
